title: Sel Sel Lyrics Kaakk Muttai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaakka Muttai Sel Sel Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Sathya Prakash
Music: GV Prakash,

Chal chalae
chal chalae chal chal.
chare chal chalae
chal chalae chal.

Chal chalae chal chalae
siragai virithu sel.
Chal chalae chal chalae
kaattril yaeri sel.

Po po, vazhve
kaakkaa mutta thaan.
kottai vittae
potta satta thaan.

Mazhai veyil
rendum engal
annan thambi thaan.
Natchathiram varuvadhu
nammai nambi thaan.

ingae vali yaavum
nerillai sandhula
pondhula po po
po poda po poda
pudhu inbam thaedi po
kanpaarkkum yaavum
un sondham endrenni po
innum melae po.

Thooral vandhaalingae
koni kudaiyaagumey.
oru quater bottle-lai
vilakkaai maattri
iruttai ottiduvom.

ada yaar veedum
nam veedu ena enni
vazhugirom po po
po  poda po poda
pudhu inbam thaedi po
kanpaarkkum yaavum
un sondham endrenni po
innum melae po.

Touser dhapaal petti
dhosthu aattu kutti.
dhinam anjae rupaai
kidachaa podhum
hero naangaladaa.

rathiri engal
kachchaerikku
vandugal paadumadaa
ada ration card
adhil engal
naai per serthiduvom.

po po
po  poda po poda
pudhu inbam thaedi po
kanpaarkkum yaavum
un sondham endrenni po
innum melae po.

Chal chalae chal chalae
siragai virithu sel.
Chal chalae chal chalae
kaattril yaeri sel.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sel Sel?

The song Sel Sel conveys a sense of freedom and joy, encouraging listeners to embrace life and its adventures.

What is the plot context of Kaakka Muttai related to this song?

The song is featured in Kaakka Muttai, which tells the story of two young boys from a slum who dream of tasting pizza, reflecting their aspirations and innocence.

Who is the singer of Sel Sel?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his energetic and lively performances.

Who composed the music for Sel Sel?

The music for Sel Sel was composed by GV PrakashKumar, a prominent figure in Tamil cinema music.

When was Sel Sel released?

Sel Sel was released on May 8, 2015, as part of the Kaakka Muttai soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sel Sel, the lively beats and cheerful lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of childhood and the joy of dreaming big. Set against the backdrop of Kaakka Muttai, the song captures the aspirations of two young boys as they navigate their world. The energetic composition by GV PrakashKumar, paired with Sathya Prakash's vibrant vocals, evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. This track is a perfect anthem for parties and joyful gatherings, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sel Sel from Kaakka Muttai is an infectious dance number that captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Sathya Prakash's vibrant vocals and GV PrakashKumar's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the joy and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Chal, keep going, keep going, keep going.
Keep going, spread your wings and fly. Keep going, rise up in the wind and fly.
Go away, life is just a crow's egg. If you break the shell, it's just a mess.
Rain and sun are both our brothers. The star that comes is our hope.
Here, there is no time for pain, just go away, go away, seek new joy, and everything will be fine, I say go away, go away.
When the rain comes, it will become a hat. We will change a quarter bottle into a lamp and light it up.
In the midst of the crowd, we will sleep with our hands stretched out.
There are fights, and there will always be fights here.
I will forget everything in my heart with love.
There are doors, but no way out in our street.
Whoever's house is ours, we live thinking about it, go away, go away, seek new joy, and everything will be fine, I say go away, go away.
The trousers are tight, and the little one is a nuisance. Every day, if a little money comes, we are the heroes.
That unknown class is just a class, but experience is more important.
Who said that shouting is a nuisance?
Shouting is like a mother's embrace, isn't it?
At night, when we go to the market, we will sing. Our ration card will include our dog’s name too.
Go away, go away, seek new joy, and everything will be fine, I say go away, go away.
Keep going, spread your wings and fly. Keep going, rise up in the wind and fly.
